meaning: n.半圆形,半圆形斗技场,半圆形房间
examples: Oviduct is located besides of unfix side of ovary that forms a hemicycle around ovary.
Duodenal diverticulum manifested as hemicycle lesion with gaseous density which had air-fluid level behind pancreatic head with clear border.
Once the aquifer disconnect from the stream, the inverted saturated zone of the rectangular streambed show a hemicycle, and that of rectangular streambed show a vertical rhombus.
